goal: Wire up the notification bell, explore the app as a homebrewer with test credentials, fix any runtime issues discovered, and verify build + tests.
summary: Phase 3 complete: wired up notification bell dropdown with mark-as-read and navigation, verified build passes with zero TS errors, all 37 tests pass, and Playwright walkthrough of all major routes confirmed zero runtime errors. Discovered and fixed a Community.tsx bug where usePosts return shape was treated as an array.
stepSummaries:
1. Add notification bell click handler in AppLayout.tsx that opens a dropdown of notifications with mark-as-read action [verified]
  2. Build the app and check for zero TypeScript/build errors [verified]
  3. Run the full test suite and verify all tests pass [verified]
  4. Run app walkthrough via Playwright or dev server + browser with test credentials; verify every major route loads without runtime errors [verified]

reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1 verified by grep for onClick in AppLayout.tsx and manual build/test pass. Step 2 verified by build with zero TS errors. Step 3 verified by 37/37 tests passing. Step 4 verified by Playwright walkthrough showing 'All routes visited with no runtime errors.' No proxy-only steps.
gateVerdicts.rationale: All four steps had real verification: UI component presence (grep), compiler (vite), test runner (vitest), and browser automation (Playwright).

gateVerdicts.evidence: Phase 3 outputs: (1) Notification bell opens a dropdown showing unread notifications with mark-as-read + navigation, (2) Build completes with zero errors, (3) All 37 tests pass, (4) Playwright walkthrough confirmed every major route loads without runtime errors and discovered/fixed a Community.tsx data-shape bug.
gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase 3 delivered the verification and polish promised: notification UI wired, build/tests green, app walkthrough clean.

gateVerdicts.evidence: Nothing deferred. All planned work completed. Deep edge-case testing (offline state, mobile responsive, every batch detail page) was out of scope for this ferment.
gateVerdicts.rationale: No unresolved items. Offline/mobile deep testing was explicitly beyond the 'stop the bleeding' scope.
